items.title: getting it access to data is important too, add in the gmail, google calendar, etc.
items.title_zh: 让它访问数据也很重要，添加 gmail、谷歌日历等。
items.description: getting it access to data is important too, add in the gmail, google calendar, etc. connectors but I think people underestimate how much context they have in files
items.description_zh: 让它访问数据也很重要，添加 gmail、谷歌日历等连接器，但我认为人们低估了文件中的上下文数量

items.title: Founders must stop trying to building 2010-era businesses with 2026-era technology.
items.title_zh: 创始人必须停止尝试用 2026 时代的技术打造 2010 时代的企业。
items.description: Founders must stop trying to building 2010-era businesses with 2026-era technology. Don't try to rebuild Foursquare or Yelp. Don't try to recreate Basecamp by 37 Signals with $10/mo SaaS pricing. Don't underprice! If it works it's worth a…
items.description_zh: 创始人必须停止尝试用 2026 时代的技术打造 2010 时代的企业。不要尝试重建 Foursquare 或 Yelp。不要尝试通过 37 Signals 以 10 美元/月 SaaS 定价重新创建 Basecamp。请勿低价！如果它有效，那么值得……

items.title: GStack is still getting better daily.
items.title_zh: GStack 每天都在变得更好。
items.description: GStack is still getting better daily. Just shipped v1.47 Thanks @jayzalowitz for the PR idea Extra useful for when I need to fix GBrain issues and need to create a precise spec about the bug directly out of the OpenClaw instance that hit t…
items.description_zh: GStack 每天都在变得更好。刚刚发布 v1.47 感谢 @jayzalowitz 的 PR 想法，当我需要修复 GBrain 问题并且需要直接从 OpenClaw 实例中创建一个关于 bug 的精确规范时，它非常有用。
